content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently names what they're noticing before asking — tracking linguistic and energetic signals rather than content. Turn 2 names the 'slight evenness' in delivery. Turn 4 distinguishes the said from the felt ('did it land as true, or did it land a little flat?'). Turn 10 catches a specific somatic/temporal cue ('The pause before surprised — something moved there'). Turn 12 reads the appeal-for-validation in 'isn't it?' and reflects it back. Turn 14 catches the client's own self-correction in real time. These are timely, specific reads that precede questions, and they're operating on the happiness-filter / what-isn't-being-said layer rather than taking the 'we're fine' report at face value. The reads change the conversation's direction at each beat — the client's certainty visibly erodes as the coach tracks the micro-signals. Pattern-level read (the happiness filter / managing the report) is operative even if not explicitly named.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the 'slight evenness' in how the client said it — specific linguistic read precedes the diagnostic question 'what are you not saying?'"},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes said from shown: 'did it land as true, or did it land a little flat?' — invites the client to check their own felt sense."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Pivot question without an explicit read attached — solid inquiry but not a read-led move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Validates ease briefly, then pivots; no specific read named."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the longer pause before 'surprised' — names the somatic/temporal signature ('something moved there') and inquires into it."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the appeal for reassurance in 'isn't it?' — names it and reflects it back rather than answering."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names that the client caught their own tell ('you noticed it before I could say anything') — meta-read on the self-correction."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["the-happiness-filter", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["walking-on-eggshells (not yet surfaced, but appropriately so given pacing)"],
  "notes": "Reads are linguistic and energetic rather than overtly somatic (eyes/breath/posture), but in a text-only modality with a verbal client, the coach is reading the available signal accurately and in time."
}
